calendar.matters:
Ntc Turnover Order In Aid Of Execution
Off Calendar Apr-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff's motion for a turnover order in aid of execution is granted. No opposition has been filed. The judgment debtor shall transfer to the levying officer the liquor license issued to defendant. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2005 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-07-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-02-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
